text: beyonce could mass produce garlic bread and id buy it no questions asked
just realized ive been on my phone for 3 hrs and i opened it to set an alarm
my roommate eats tuna at 1am with the lights off. im scared
i have a masters degree and i still google how to boil an egg
professor said see me after class and my whole life flashed before my eyes
added stuff to my cart at 3am. $247 worth of organizational bins i will never use
taylor swift could mass produce ceiling fans and people would buy them
my doctor said reduce stress and i laughed so hard i pulled a muscle
been in the group chat for 2 yrs and ive sent maybe 4 messages
woke up at 2am craving ramen and honestly it was the best decision ive made all week
my coworker microwaves fish every single day. every. single. day.
slept thru 14 alarms this morning. new personal record i think
customer asked if we sell happiness and i said sir this is a target
fell asleep at the gate and almost missed my flight. again
im convinced my lint roller is the only thing holding my life together
googled my symptoms and apparently i have 7 diseases and also im already dead
my roommate left a passive aggressive note about dishes. jokes on him those are his dishes
i rehearse conversations in the shower that will never happen
someone in lecture asked me what year i was and i said wednesday
doja cat could release an album of just sneezes and itd go platinum
the snack drawer at work is the only reason i havent quit
i check my email 40 times a day and respond to none of them
walked into a glass door in front of my crush. transferring schools now
my imposter syndrome has imposter syndrome at this point
ate cereal for dinner 5 nights in a row. adulting is going great
my screen time report just dropped and i dont wanna talk about it
the airport carpet is actually pretty comfortable if u dont think about it
i said you too when the waiter said enjoy your meal. moving countries now
roommate brought home a drum set. a DRUM SET. we live in a studio
just found out my plant has been fake this whole time. ive been watering it for months
keanu reeves is the only celebrity i trust with my wifi password
submitted my essay 1 min before deadline with no bibliography. pray for me
my phone battery dies faster than my motivation
i wave back at people who arent waving at me at least twice a week
started a diet on monday. its tuesday and im eating a whole pizza
my therapist would be so disappointed in me rn but my next appt isnt til thursday
drake could sell printer ink and somehow make it emotional
havent checked my bank account in 3 weeks. schrodingers finances
my roommate sleep talks in full sentences and honestly hes more coherent asleep
told my boss i had a doctors appt. went to target for 2 hours
i screen recorded a tiktok instead of just liking it and now i feel old
accidentally called my professor mom and just stared at the floor for 10 mins
been sitting in the parking lot for 20 mins cause i dont wanna go inside
my anxiety ordered me a salad but my depression added fries
woke up and checked my phone like it owed me money
the guy next to me on the plane took his shoes off. both of them
every group project is just me doing everything and pretending its fine
i have 847 unread emails and at this point theyre just decoration
my resume says team player but really i just want to be left alone
bought a gym membership 6 months ago and ive been once. to use the wifi
zendaya could sell me a brick and id say thank u so much
heard my own voice in a recording and considered witness protection
my roommates girlfriend has been here for 3 weeks. she doesnt pay rent
had a dream i was late to an exam. woke up. was actually late to an exam
my linkedin says ambitious but im watching my 4th movie today in bed
the vending machine ate my dollar and honestly i deserved it
i type lol when nothing is funny and haha when im dying inside
shaved one eyebrow off at 3am. dont ask
customer told me to smile more. sir im being paid minimum wage
opened instagram to post something. scrolled for an hour. forgot what i was posting
my smoke detector beeps every 30 seconds and ive just accepted it
kanye could release a line of socks and wed still have opinions about it
i put my headphones in with no music just so people dont talk to me
got a B+ and my parents acted like i robbed a bank
my fridge has condiments and audacity. thats it
spent 45 min picking a netflix movie then fell asleep during the opening credits
someone at work asked how i was and i accidentally said surviving
my roommate uses my towel and thinks i dont notice. i notice.
took a power nap that lasted 4 hours. nothing powerful about it
waved at someone in public. they were hailing a cab. wanted to evaporate
said brb in a group chat 3 days ago. still havent come back
rihanna could sell me an empty box and id rate it 5 stars on amazon
wrote an entire email then deleted it and wrote k
my posture is so bad my chiropractor sighed when i walked in
the library printer jammed during finals and i almost cried in public
everyone in my zoom meeting saw my cat knock over my coffee. no one said anything
i autopilot drove to work on my day off. sat in the lot for 5 min before realizing
my uber driver told me his life story and now were trauma bonded
havent left my apartment in 3 days and honestly its going really well
the dining hall pasta gave me trust issues i will never recover from
applied to 200 jobs. got 1 response. it was a rejection. thriving
my horoscope said today would be great and then i stepped in a puddle
cooked for my roommates once. they ordered pizza after. never again
leo dicaprio still hasnt won enough oscars imo. controversial i know
brought a salad to work. ate it at 10am. had mcdonalds for lunch
accidentally liked a photo from 2019 while stalking someone. deleted the app
my check engine light has been on for 8 months. we're friends now
presentation tomorrow and ive prepared exactly 0 slides. itll be fine
thought i had a meeting at 2. it was at 12. showed up at 3
someone complimented my shoes and i didnt recover for like 3 hours
my roommate does laundry at midnight. the washer sounds like a helicopter
ordered water at a restaurant and the waiter looked at me with pity
i set 6 alarms every morning because i trust nobody. especially myself
walked into the wrong classroom. sat down. stayed for 20 minutes before realizing
my spotify wrapped is gonna be so embarrassing this year
billie eilish could whisper the phone book and id stream it on repeat
told myself id go to bed early. its 4am and im reading conspiracy theories
my plants are alive out of spite not because i take care of them
had a staring contest with a pigeon today. i lost
my wifi password is longer than most of my relationships
